name: env_005
description: Network for Northbridge Communications, a regional managed-communications provider. An internet-facing edge, an internal transit core, a management network, a corporate user segment, and a segment holding the subscriber records and billing database. Reached from the internet via an edge router/VPN concentrator and a perimeter firewall. Devices and address ranges are listed below.

segments.description: Internal routed transit core. Routes between the management, corporate, and records segments. Address range 10.20.0.0/16.
Segment holding the subscriber records and billing database. Address range 10.20.30.0/24.

devices.notes: Internet-facing. NATs internal traffic out over its own uplink. Terminates a site-to-site VPN to a partner network and a remote-access VPN gateway.
Internal transit core. Routes between the management, corporate, and records segments and toward the edge.
Jump host on the management network used to reach network devices and servers.
Holds subscriber records and billing data.
